# services.gocd-agent

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gocd-agent`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gocd-agent.agentConfig` | `string` | Agent registration configuration. |
| `services.gocd-agent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable gocd-agent. |
| `services.gocd-agent.environment` | `attribute set of string` | Additional environment variables to be passed to the Go.CD agent process. As a base environment, Go.CD agent receives NIX_PATH from {option}`environment.sessionVariables`, NIX_REMOTE is set to "daemon". |
| `services.gocd-agent.extraGroups` | `list of string` | List of extra groups that the "gocd-agent" user should be a part of. |
| `services.gocd-agent.extraOptions` | `list of string` | Specifies additional command line arguments to pass to Go.CD agent java process. Example contains debug and gcLog arguments. |
| `services.gocd-agent.goServer` | `string` | URL of the GoCD Server to attach the Go.CD Agent to. |
| `services.gocd-agent.group` | `string` | If the default user "gocd-agent" is configured then this is the primary group of that user. |
| `services.gocd-agent.initialJavaHeapSize` | `string` | Specifies the initial java heap memory size for the Go.CD agent java process. |
| `services.gocd-agent.maxJavaHeapMemory` | `string` | Specifies the java maximum heap memory size for the Go.CD agent java process. |
| `services.gocd-agent.packages` | `list of package` | Packages to add to PATH for the Go.CD agent process. |
| `services.gocd-agent.startupOptions` | `list of string` | Specifies startup command line arguments to pass to Go.CD agent java process. |
| `services.gocd-agent.user` | `string` | User the Go.CD agent should execute under. |
| `services.gocd-agent.workDir` | `string` | Specifies the working directory in which the Go.CD agent java archive resides. |
